note: Token Or is pure token syntax on top of the Token module: OR/fallback with '|', literal-string fallback with quotes, a swapped 'token' service, and a 'tokens_pre' alter. No UI, no config, no plugin type. Cases are `recipe` (response-graded), probing documented facts an agent would otherwise read source to answer; no site mutation.

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site with the token_or module, I want a token that uses an Open Graph image field, but falls back to a header image field if the first is empty. Write the token expression.
evals.expected_output: A single bracketed token whose candidates are separated by pipes, e.g. [node:field_og_image:entity:url|node:field_header_image:entity:url]; the first non-empty candidate wins.

evals.prompt: Using token_or, how do I add a hard-coded default string as the final fallback when every token in the chain is empty? Show an example.
evals.expected_output: Wrap the literal in double quotes as the last candidate, e.g. [node:field_summary|"No description."]; a quoted candidate is used verbatim (quotes stripped).

evals.prompt: Can I chain more than two tokens with token_or, and how are candidates evaluated? Give a three-candidate example.
evals.expected_output: Yes—any number of candidates separated by |, evaluated left to right; the first non-empty result wins, e.g. [node:field_a|node:field_b|"default"].

evals.prompt: What module does token_or require, and how does it make its OR syntax work everywhere tokens are replaced?
evals.expected_output: It depends on the Token module (token:token). TokenOrServiceProvider swaps the core 'token' service for Drupal\token_or\Token, which fires a 'tokens_pre' alter before replacement to expand [a|b] groups.

evals.prompt: With token_or, what happens to an OR token group like [node:field_a|node:field_b] when none of the candidates resolve? How do I make it disappear entirely?
evals.expected_output: Without options the original [a|b] text is left in place; passing the 'clear' option (['clear' => TRUE]) removes the unresolved group entirely.

evals.prompt: Does token_or provide a plugin type or 'modifier' plugin for adding custom fallback tokens? How do I make my own token usable inside a token_or OR chain?
evals.expected_output: No—token_or has no plugin/modifier type. Register the token with the standard Token API (hook_token_info() + hook_tokens()); returning an empty string lets the next candidate win, and it participates in [..|..] automatically.

evals.prompt: Which service in token_or actually parses the pipe (|) OR syntax, and which hook triggers it?
evals.expected_output: The token_or.tokens_pre_alter service (TokenOrTokensPreAlter) parses the | syntax; it is invoked via hook_tokens_pre_alter(), fired by the overridden token service before replacement.
